subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Táhir! He round Whom circle the Concourse on High and the dwellers of Paradise maketh mention of thee on this night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل طاهر یذکرک فی هذا اللیل من طاف حوله الملا الاعلی و اهل الفرودس
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
